title: esenbeckia amazonica
intro: Esenbeckia amazonica, also known as 'Cascarilla', is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Rutaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Esenbeckia amazonica include relief from fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiviral agent to combat infections. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
